title: Car Radio Removal Tool Key DIN Release Keys Compatible with FIAT 500, Brava 1.5 Siena Idea Palio MK3 Panda Punto Qubo Sedici Stilo Strada Tipo Ulysse UNO Head Unit CD Player Pins Universal Pin (4pcs)
features: Easy DIY Radio Removal – Simple to use release keys allow fast, tool-free removal of the factory radio, saving time and garage costs. Insert the keys into the left and right release slots, unlock the head unit, and slide the radio out safely. Clear step-by-step instructions included below.

Perfect Fit and Wide Vehicle Coverage – Suitable for car stereos with two round release holes approximately 3 cm apart on both sides. Compatible with a wide range of vehicles including hatchback, sedan, saloon, estate, 4x4, jeep, MPV and SUV models. Fits vehicles from model years 2000 to 2016. Full compatibility list provided in the description below.

Durable Heavy-Duty Construction – Manufactured from thick, rigid metal to ensure long-lasting strength and reliability. Designed to resist bending or breaking during use, providing safe and dependable performance when removing or installing car stereo units.

Pack of 4 Stereo Removal Keys – Supplied as a set of four tools for secure and balanced radio extraction. Each key measures approximately 8 cm by 3.3 cm with a 3 mm thickness, manufactured from durable nickel-plated steel for strength, corrosion resistance and long service life.

Universal Stereo Compatibility – Designed to fit car radios with two release holes on each side. Compatible with a wide range of FIAT models including 500, Brava, Siena, Idea, Palio, MK3, Panda, Punto, Qubo, Sedici, Stilo, Strada, Tipo, Ulysse and UNO, as well as other stereos using the same dual-hole release system.
description: The Keple Radio Removal Tool Set is a must-have for removing single or double din radio units out of 1998+ Volkswagen and Audi vehicles. Because stereo units can sometimes be stuck or difficult to remove, these tools were made of thick metal to prevent bending or breaking while in the middle of a job. These stereo removal tools come in a pack of 2 INSTRUCTIONS 1) Practice inserting just one end to see how far it goes in before actuating a release. The goal is to hit all four releases. Go ahead and try all 4 keys to see which works best. 2) When you find 2 keys which are suitable, put them inside the radio. 3) Push radio keys outwards (away from the radio) just to engage successfully to pull out the radio. Then simply pull the radio out of the dashboard. 4) Please contact us if you have any issues in using this tools we will be happy to help. UNIVERSAL COMPATIBILITY Fits all stereos which have 2 holes on each side including: FIAT: 500, Brava, 1.5, Siena, Idea, Palio, MK3, Panda, Punto, Qubo, Sedici, Stilo, Strada, Tipo, Ulysse, UNO
